query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `closureId` int NOT NULL,
  `expenseId` int NOT NULL,
  `category` enum('arriendo','energia','agua','internet','mantenimiento','herramientas','jardineria','reparaciones','transporte','papeleria','aseo','otro') NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  `expenseDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_closureId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`closureId`) REFERENCES `accountingClosures`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_expenseId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`expenseId`) REFERENCES `expenses`(`id`),
  INDEX `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_closureId_idx` (`closureId`),
  INDEX `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_expenseId_idx` (`expenseId`),
  INDEX `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_category_idx` (`category`)
);
command:

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,

  `category` enum('arriendo','energia','agua','internet','mantenimiento','herramientas','jardineria','reparaciones','transporte','papeleria','aseo','otro') NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  `expenseDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_closureId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`closureId`) REFERENCES `accountingClosures`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_expenseId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`expenseId`) REFERENCES `expenses`(`id`),
  INDEX `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_closureId_idx` (`closureId`),
  INDEX `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_expenseId_idx` (`expenseId`),
  INDEX `accountingClosureOperationalExpenses_category_idx` (`category`)
);
